case_title: IGDALOFF,NANCY TRUSTEE UNDER DAVID IGDALOFF TRUST VS WOOLFORD, PAUL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $297.89 FILED BY IGDALOFF,NANCY TRUSTEE UNDER DAVID IGDALOFF TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLFORD, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF IGDALOFF,NANCY TRUSTEE UNDER DAVID IGDALOFF TRUST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IGDALOFF,NANCY TRUSTEE UNDER DAVID IGDALOFF TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOOLFORD, PAUL $297.89 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $323.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLFORD, PAUL
CERTFD.MAIL TO PAUL WOOLFORD RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WOOLFORD, PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT IGDALOFF,NANCY TRUSTEE UNDER DAVID IGDALOFF TRUST PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
